observations.archetype_gloss: Represents the darker, coercive power of abundance and death, embodying internal and external destructive drives
observations.summary: Dagon appears as a god of abundance chosen by Dan's father, representing a shadow archetype projecting destructive and coercive power that Dan must confront and reject.

evidence.quote: "I am Dagon. The power your father has chosen. Lord of Abundance." A pause the length of a slow tide. "Ask, and receive. My path is ease."
